--[[ v1.0.0 https://wearedevs.net/obfuscator ]] return(function(...)local X={"\090\106\065\077\055\114\065\100\053\048\076\068\089\085\070\055\080\049\071\061";"\080\108\071\061","\102\121\082\112\080\077\090\065";"\082\116\106\112\102\116\082\079\071\086\087\065\070\116\082\066\070\116\082\084\071\055\061\061","\070\120\113\115\099\120\100\101";"\102\103\100\057\119\103\110\066\070\120\048\115\099\056\113\087\114\081\061\061","\102\121\106\109\090\116\076\112";"\052\049\072\072\080\116\072\057\087\048\076\089\055\065\122\085\120\081\061\061";"\119\111\061\061";"\055\049\055\048\100\048\090\100\114\121\084\077\119\051\110\069";"\055\121\065\121\102\103\082\116\090\085\065\087";"\080\116\076\078\090\103\100\048\102\121\065\109\090\115\061\061";"","\070\116\076\085\070\103\072\110\080\121\102\061";"\050\103\087\048\102\086\070\065\070\081\061\061";"\090\056\106\112\090\055\061\061","\099\056\076\109\099\056\106\048";"\051\105\076\075\090\120\043\061","\070\116\106\118\080\116\097\061";"\080\103\082\105\052\114\078\051\097\086\112\068\082\051\099\117\055\111\061\061","\080\116\082\109","\070\077\070\087\097\103\078\114\050\108\087\079\050\077\102\048";"\051\105\076\049\099\115\061\061","\102\077\087\079\089\120\113\049","\097\106\065\079\082\048\112\073\087\120\117\072\080\116\106\113","\051\105\076\110\080\121\087\065\052\081\061\061","\102\056\082\048\080\120\082\048\099\051\087\078\099\121\117\065","\102\116\100\078\080\116\115\061","\090\051\072\079\080\077\071\061";"\070\116\076\109\070\120\105\118\090\051\071\061";"\114\065\070\122\114\103\069\073\100\115\061\061";"\080\108\086\061";"\053\116\078\066\120\084\122\077\089\084\084\056\080\051\082\087\097\111\061\061";"\090\056\105\078\070\116\100\122";"\099\056\078\078\102\111\061\061";"\080\120\106\048\089\081\061\061","\080\066\078\072\089\086\087\050\053\082\065\075\102\082\122\048","\119\118\111\065\090\098\122\110\119\111\061\061";"\053\105\090\110","\114\049\069\121\055\097\070\115\090\108\078\121\120\116\078\069\053\085\097\061";"\089\051\069\085\087\056\071\079\102\097\071\061","\ return(function(X,m,w,C,N,i,B,h,y,I,U,x,E,Y,W,r,Q,a,H,M,D)D,a,Q,r,h,I,U,W,H,x,M,Y,E,y=function(D,w,C,N)local l,f,s,O,G,v,z,k,L,F,o,P,S,p,t,A,n,W,b,e,Z,B,g,V,T,K,u,J,U,Y,a,d,R,Q while D do if
